Hi3516DV300 Datasheet
=====================

1. Overview

The Hi3516DV300 is a high-performance SoC designed for IP cameras and smart video
applications. It integrates an ARM Cortex-A7 dual-core processor, a high-performance
ISP, H.265/H.264 video codec engine, and an intelligent video analysis accelerator (NNIE).

2. Key Features

Processor:
- Dual-core ARM Cortex-A7 @ 900MHz
- 32KB I-Cache / 32KB D-Cache per core
- NEON and FPU

Neural Network Inference Engine (NNIE):
- Deep learning inference accelerator
- Supports CNN frameworks: Caffe, TensorFlow
- Performance: 0.5 TOPS

DSP Core:
- C66x DSP core for audio/video pre-processing

Video Codec:
- H.265 Main Profile encode/decode, up to 5MP @ 30fps
- H.264 Baseline/Main/High Profile encode/decode
- MJPEG encode/decode
- Multi-stream encoding support

Image Sensor Interface:
- Supports IMX307 and OV2718 image sensors
- MIPI CSI-2 / sub-LVDS / HiSPi / DC
- Max resolution: 5MP (2592 × 1944)

Memory:
- DDR3/DDR3L: 512 MB max
- DDR base address: 0x80000000, size: 536870912 bytes (512MB)
- On-chip SRAM: 64KB at 0x04010000

Flash Interface:
- SPI NOR Flash: up to 16 MB
- SPI NAND Flash: up to 128 MB
- eMMC 4.51 interface

Peripherals:
- 3 × I2C bus controllers
- 2 × SPI master
- 4 × UART (with flow control)
- 10 × GPIO groups (up to 80 GPIOs)
- 2 × 12-bit ADC channels
- 6 × PWM outputs
- 1 × SDIO 3.0 interface
- 1 × Ethernet 10/100M PHY (RMII)
- USB2.0-OTG × 1
- USB2.0-Host × 1

Display:
- 7-inch 1024x600 LVDS LCD support
- BT.656/BT.1120 output

Audio:
- Built-in audio codec
- G.711/G.726 voice codec support
- I2S interface

Security:
- AES/DES/3DES hardware encryption
- SHA-256 hardware hash
- Secure boot support

Package:
- BGA 289-pin, 15mm × 15mm

Operating Temperature: -40°C to +85°C

Power Supply: 3.3V / 1.0V core
